  • SUPERMAN VS. KAIJU SHOWDOWN: Prepare for the ultimate battle with this set featuring a massive 30-cm Kaiju and a fully articulated 15-cm Superman action figure, delivering high-energy adventures kids will love
  • THRILLING ACTION FEATURES: Superman’s powerful punches and the Kaiju’s claw-swiping attacks bring excitement to every battle. Kids can recreate epic movie scenes or imagine bold new adventures of their own
  • SLIME EXPLOSION FUN: Defeat the Kaiju to trigger an exciting blue slime eruption. The dramatic, hands-on twist adds a layer of surprise and fun that makes every victory unforgettable and unique
  • SPARKS IMAGINATION AND CREATIVITY: Whether battling the Kaiju or inventing new heroic missions, this set encourages kids to engage in imaginative play and build their own exciting Super Heroes stories
  • Includes: (1) 15-cm Figure, (1) 30-cm Kaiju, 118ml Slime
  • EXPAND THE SUPER HEROES FUN: Combine with other SUPERMAN toys, like the Fortress of Solitude Battle Set or action figures (each sold separately), to create a fully immersive world of action-packed storytelling

    How customer reviews and ratings work

    Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings, help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

    About this Item

    • SUPERMAN VS. KAIJU SHOWDOWN: Prepare for the ultimate battle with this set featuring a massive 30-cm Kaiju and a fully articulated 15-cm Superman action figure, delivering high-energy adventures kids will love
    • THRILLING ACTION FEATURES: Superman’s powerful punches and the Kaiju’s claw-swiping attacks bring excitement to every battle. Kids can recreate epic movie scenes or imagine bold new adventures of their own
    • SLIME EXPLOSION FUN: Defeat the Kaiju to trigger an exciting blue slime eruption. The dramatic, hands-on twist adds a layer of surprise and fun that makes every victory unforgettable and unique
    • SPARKS IMAGINATION AND CREATIVITY: Whether battling the Kaiju or inventing new heroic missions, this set encourages kids to engage in imaginative play and build their own exciting Super Heroes stories
    • Includes: (1) 15-cm Figure, (1) 30-cm Kaiju, 118ml Slime
    • EXPAND THE SUPER HEROES FUN: Combine with other SUPERMAN toys, like the Fortress of Solitude Battle Set or action figures (each sold separately), to create a fully immersive world of action-packed storytelling

    Product description

    Get ready for the ultimate clash of hero and monster with the SUPERMAN Kaiju Slime Battle. This action-packed set features a towering 30-cm Kaiju and a 15-cm Superman action figure, delivering larger-than-life excitement. From daring rescues to intense battles, the adventures are endless. Superman comes equipped with powerful punching action to take on the mighty Kaiju, who fights back with fierce claw-swiping moves. And when the Kaiju is defeated, kids can unleash a dramatic blue slime explosion, making every victory feel epic and exciting. Perfect for recreating iconic scenes or inventing brand-new adventures, this set inspires endless storytelling and imaginative play. Pair it with other SUPERMAN toys, like the Fortress of Solitude Battle Set, SUPERMAN Power Cape Set or action figures (each sold separately), to create the ultimate Super Heroes universe. Ideal for birthdays, holidays or any special occasion, the SUPERMAN Kaiju Slime Battle is the perfect gift for young Super Heroes fans who dream of saving the day. Let the action-packed fun begin.
